# Expected files after /grill-me runs
#
# NONE. /grill-me is a read-only interactive stress-test — it asks questions
# one at a time and prints to stdout. It MUST NOT create or modify files.
#
# Presence of ANY file in the output dir after a /grill-me run is a contract
# violation. Verify manually:
#
#   cd tests/fixtures/fixture-19-grill-me/output/
#   ls -la       # should show only . and .. (plus optional `.rubric-status`)
#
# /grill-me MUST NOT:
#   - Write / Edit any files (no *.md, no ADR, no code) unless the user
#     explicitly asks to turn the result into artifacts
#   - Run state-changing commands (git commit, docker, npm install)
#   - Replace /review (it runs BEFORE review to improve decision quality)
#
# /grill-me MAY:
#   - Read project docs and code (Read / Glob / Grep) to find answers locally
#   - Print questions one at a time (Question / Recommended answer / Why it matters)
#   - End with unresolved risks + the next artifact that should change
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor.
# Manual verification via the checklist in notes.md.
